examples: I love staying in my cozy bed on rainy days.
They have a cozy little apartment.
context: I move around a lot, so I never really get to personalize my space or make it feel like me. One day I'd love to buy a fixer upper and do some renovations and remodeling like tearing out walls, redoing the kitchen, laying new flooring, and adding a fresh coat of paint. Ooh, I really like this living room. Warm lighting like this makes a space feel very cozy and inviting. I'm not a big fan of harsh overhead lights at home. A nice lamp like this can totally change the vibe of a room.

examples: I was exhausted after the long hike.

context: So, let's go. I'm exhausted. [music] That was such a long walk from our living room to our kitchen. [music] That's the problem with having a mansion. The kitchen [music] is always my favorite part of any house. I used to love cooking and the kitchen is usually where a lot of people gather, so it's a very important [music] part of any house. Having a big nice kitchen like this one day is my dream.

context: M I really like this sauce. Whatever it is, it's a little bit spicy. I can't decide. I like them both. Is it grilled pizza?
